creative_premise: A three-room weather anthology discovered through play: pressure writes a score, the score opens an echo chamber, and three echoes open a mechanical rain instrument.

behavioral_proof.discovery_gate: Rain Organ link remains hidden until Afterbell contains at least three marks.
behavioral_proof.keyboard_route: R enters Rain Organ after the gate opens.
behavioral_proof.rollback_route: Every change is static and reversible by restoring an earlier commit; no storage, database, migration, secrets, or external assets are involved.
contract_checks: no payment, checkout, analytics, or fetch dependency
Rain Organ is gated by score state

hosting_evidence.expected_surface: GitHub Pages artifact publishing independent-web/ only
hosting_evidence.reason: No Pages run identity or served deployment response was available in this run. Repository commit status showed one unrelated Vercel context success and four Vercel rate-limit failures; none proves GitHub Pages publication.

independence_boundary: The anthology contains no Mirror Cartographer explanation, research interface, worker dashboard, personal model, conversion funnel, payment path, diagnosis, treatment claim, account, tracker, or network-dependent media.
verification_strength: committed source and deterministic contract design; live execution and public deployment remain unverified
limits: The runtime environment could not resolve github.com for a fresh clone, so Node tests were not executed locally.
The connector did not expose an exhaustive GitHub Pages workflow-run result.
Mobile behavior is source-constrained but not device-captured in this run.
next_action: Obtain the GitHub Pages run and page_url for commit aab6de5bb5af42fe096266bd7656cb19caa75d5e or a descendant, then capture desktop and mobile proof of the three-room progression.
